engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is evaluating a software product (hotel software) via its features, compliance/security proof, and testimonials — no personal expertise sold, no portfolio, no place to browse. Full feature/testimonial argument makes it a thing.

goal.one_action: request a personalized price quote (via unit-count/postal-code calculator) or book a consultation

structure.archetype_note: Feature-led SaaS marketing site; pricing fully lead-gated behind a quote calculator, no public tiers.

mapped.observed_as: Die einfache Hotelsoftware für kleine Hotels und Ferienwohnungen
Digitale, automatisierte & cloudbasierte Verwaltung für Hotels und Ferienwohnungen
Die moderne Hotelsoftware für erfolgreiche Vermietung
Du kümmerst dich um deine Gäste, wir um den Rest!
Hotelsoftware für Gastgeber:innen und Tourismusregionen seit 2006
Was sagen unsere Kund:innen über die Hotelsoftware?
Hand in Hand mit starken Partner:innen
Mit wenigen Klicks deinen Preis berechnen lassen

unmapped.why_no_fit: A dedicated emergency/support intake form for existing customers — not a conversion CTA, a post-sale support channel

proposed_new.name: interactive-calculators
proposed_new.evidence: Preise page: dynamic price calculator computes a user-specific quote from unit count + postal code before routing to email quote

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full; clear feature-led SaaS with lead-gated pricing, structure and CTAs well captured

gap_findings: Pricing is fully lead-gated behind a compute-a-quote calculator (no public tiers) — the canonical `pricing` section assumes displayed prices; a quote-calculator-as-pricing pattern isn't cleanly expressible.
Emergency/support intake form is a post-sale customer channel with no taxonomy slot (conversion model assumes prospect capture only).
